artifact: Liber AL — Law as Whole-Life Formula
original: Liber AL I:40: the central law is presented as a total formula of will.
english: A law becomes esoteric when it names the whole motion of a life, not a rule outside it.
spanish: Una ley se vuelve esotérica cuando nombra el movimiento entero de una vida, no una regla externa.
recommendedEditionSource: O.T.O. public library — Liber AL vel Legis, I:40
notes: Real capture from public web source. Review-needed: confirm verse locator and rendering before promotion. Short paraphrase, no long excerpt stored.

original: Liber AL I:3: each person is figured as a star.
english: The self is not a unit in a crowd; it is an orbiting center with its own law of motion.
spanish: El yo no es una unidad en la multitud; es un centro orbital con su propia ley de movimiento.
recommendedEditionSource: O.T.O. public library — Liber AL vel Legis, I:3
notes: Real capture from public web source. Review-needed: confirm verse locator and rendering before promotion.

original: Liber AL I:57: love is subordinated to will as a magical formula.
english: Love is not sentiment here; it is force shaped by direction.
spanish: El amor no es sentimentalismo aquí; es fuerza formada por dirección.
recommendedEditionSource: O.T.O. public library — Liber AL vel Legis, I:57
notes: Real capture from public web source. Review-needed: confirm verse locator and rendering before promotion.

artifact: Liber AL — Nuit as Infinite Space
original: Liber AL I:22: Nuit is associated with dividedness for love's sake and the chance of union.
english: Multiplicity is not a fall from unity; it is the condition that lets union become event.
spanish: La multiplicidad no es caída desde la unidad; es la condición que permite que la unión acontezca.
recommendedEditionSource: O.T.O. public library — Liber AL vel Legis, I:22
notes: Real capture from public web source. Review-needed: confirm verse locator and rendering before promotion.

artifact: Liber AL — Thelema as Word of Law
original: Liber AL I:39: the word of the law is given as Thelema.
english: A single word condenses doctrine into a seed of practice.
spanish: Una sola palabra condensa la doctrina en semilla de práctica.
recommendedEditionSource: O.T.O. public library — Liber AL vel Legis, I:39
notes: Real capture from public web source. Review-needed: confirm verse locator and rendering before promotion.

artifact: Liber AL — No Law Beyond Will
original: Liber AL III:60: the text closes law back into will.
english: The final boundary is not prohibition but the discovery of one's true trajectory.
spanish: El límite final no es la prohibición sino el descubrimiento de la propia trayectoria verdadera.
recommendedEditionSource: O.T.O. public library — Liber AL vel Legis, III:60
notes: Real capture from public web source. Review-needed: confirm verse locator and rendering before promotion.

artifact: Liber 777 — Tree of Life as Correspondence Machine
original: Liber 777 organizes symbols through tabular Qabalistic correspondences.
english: A diagram becomes an engine when number, image, name, and force are made to answer one another.
spanish: Un diagrama se vuelve motor cuando número, imagen, nombre y fuerza se hacen responder entre sí.
notes: Real capture from public web source. Review-needed: select exact table/column locator before promotion.

original: Liber 777 uses numbered rows as addresses for symbolic correspondences.
english: Number here is not quantity first; it is an address where symbols gather.
spanish: El número aquí no es primero cantidad; es una dirección donde se reúnen los símbolos.
notes: Real capture from public web source. Review-needed: select exact table/column locator before promotion.

original: Liber 777 aligns planetary symbols with Qabalistic paths and ritual associations.
english: A planet becomes less an object than a grammar for organizing qualities of experience.
spanish: Un planeta deja de ser sólo objeto y se vuelve gramática para ordenar cualidades de experiencia.
notes: Real capture from public web source. Review-needed: select exact table/column locator before promotion.

original: Liber 777 arranges elemental attributions among wider symbolic tables.
english: Element is a compression: matter, temperament, direction, and ritual handle in one sign.
spanish: El elemento es una compresión: materia, temperamento, dirección y asa ritual en un solo signo.
